steps.title: Find the sentence subject
steps.content: The subject of the blank is the triangle. The phrase representing the mountain itself describes the triangle but does not change the subject. Since the subject is singular, the verb must be singular as well.

steps.title: Match the singular verb
steps.content: Choices A, B, and C use plural verb forms that do not agree with the singular subject. The remaining verb is singular present tense and correctly completes the sentence about the triangle. The answer is D.
